name: vn-nem-ran
input: four nem rán Hanoi-style fried spring rolls with pork and wood-ear mushroom
notes: Hanoi fried spring rolls (chả giò). USDA composite + VN MOH 2017: pork + glass noodle + wood-ear filling, deep-fried in palm oil. ~110–130 kcal per roll. Advisory tier — frying-fat absorption (10–20%) drives the macro spread.
